description_long: This is a modern, single-story library building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The facade features large, floor-to-ceiling glass windows on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the main reading and study area. The interior is visible through the glass, revealing rows of bookshelves, tables, and chairs arranged in an organized manner. The exterior walls are finished in a light peach color, with minimal ornamentation and a clean, geometric design. There is a fenced area at the rear, likely for service or utility access, and a main entrance with double glass doors at the front. The roofline is simple, and the building sits on a dark, raised platform that could represent a paved urban lot.
description: A modern, single-story library with large glass windows, a flat roof, and a light peach facade. The interior is visible, showing bookshelves and seating, and the main entrance features double glass doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, double glass entry doors, and the interior reading area with bookshelves and tables.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the solid peach wall, fenced utility area, and partial view of the roof and back rooms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a focus on the rear fenced area, service entrance, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Angled view of the glass facade and main reading area, emphasizing the open, transparent design and interior layout.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade is characterized by expansive glass panels framed by minimalistic, light-colored structural elements. There is little to no ornamentation, with the design focusing on clean lines and transparency, and the only detailing is the subtle pattern of window framing and the uniform peach wall surfaces.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway consists of wide, double glass doors set within the large glass facade, framed by simple, rectangular structural elements with no additional decorative features.
attribute_window_arrangement: The building features large, floor-to-ceiling windows arranged in continuous bands along the front and one side, providing a transparent view into the main reading area. The other sides have minimal or no windows, emphasizing privacy and utility.
